title: MedicationStatement
description: Represents a record of medication being taken by or administered to a patient, including dosage, frequency, and prescriber information.

medication_code.description: Coded representation of the medication product.

system.description: The coding system used (e.g., ATC-vet, RxNorm, internal).

value.description: The medication code within the specified system.

frequency.description: How often the medication is administered.

resource_type.description: Fixed resource type identifier for this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for the medication statement record. UUID recommended.

patient_id.description: Reference to the patient taking or receiving the medication.

encounter_id.description: Reference to the encounter during which the medication was prescribed or recorded.

status.description: Current status of the medication usage.

date_started.description: Date when the medication was started.

date_ended.description: Date when the medication was stopped or completed.

reason.description: Clinical reason or indication for the medication.

prescriber_id.description: Reference to the practitioner who prescribed the medication. Must match an id in the top-level practitioners array.

notes.description: Additional notes about the medication statement.
examples: Administer with food. Complete full 14-day course even if symptoms improve.
